nodes.label: +91-98xx-xx4521
nodes.riskExplanation: Primary caller number used in 47 confirmed digital arrest scam calls. Registered under fake identity.

nodes.label: +91-87xx-xx9832
nodes.riskExplanation: Secondary caller number linked to PH-001 via same IMEI device. Used in CBI impersonation calls.

nodes.label: HDFC-xxx4872
nodes.riskExplanation: Primary mule account receiving safe account transfers. ₹82L deposited and withdrawn within 48 hours.

nodes.label: SBI-xxx9213
nodes.riskExplanation: Secondary mule account. Funds received from BA-001 via RTGS and immediately transferred to crypto exchange.

nodes.label: IMEI-35291xxx
nodes.riskExplanation: Single device operating PH-001 and PH-002 via dual-SIM. Located in Jharkhand (Jamtara cluster).

nodes.label: Aadhaar-xxxx4378
nodes.riskExplanation: Fake Aadhaar used for SIM registration. Address maps to non-existent location.

nodes.label: UPI-xxx@ybl
nodes.riskExplanation: UPI VPA linked to BA-001. Used for receiving smaller scam amounts (₹10K-50K range).

nodes.label: +91-70xx-xx1245
nodes.riskExplanation: Hub phone for customs scam ring. Makes 200+ calls daily using auto-dialer. Spoofed caller ID shows Mumbai customs number.

nodes.label: +91-63xx-xx8877
nodes.riskExplanation: Backup number for PH-003. Activated when primary is blocked. Same pattern of customs/parcel scam scripts.

nodes.label: ICICI-xxx7631
nodes.riskExplanation: Corporate mule account opened with forged GST certificate. Receives customs clearance fee payments.

nodes.label: Axis-xxx3290
nodes.riskExplanation: Tier-2 layering account. Small amounts aggregated here before forwarding to crypto wallets.

nodes.label: IMEI-86774xxx
nodes.riskExplanation: Device used by ring leader. Contains auto-dialer software and pre-recorded customs scam scripts.

nodes.label: PAN-AECPx4821
nodes.riskExplanation: PAN card used for opening BA-003. Belongs to an unaware person whose identity was stolen.

nodes.label: UPI-xxx@paytm
nodes.riskExplanation: Merchant UPI used to collect customs clearance fees. Disguised as logistics company.

nodes.label: +91-91xx-xx5567
nodes.riskExplanation: WhatsApp number used for investment/crypto scam recruitment via Telegram groups.

nodes.label: +91-85xx-xx2210
nodes.riskExplanation: Secondary recruitment number. Sends trading group links and fake profit screenshots.

nodes.label: Kotak-xxx5544
nodes.riskExplanation: Primary collection account for crypto investment scam. Receives victim deposits and converts to USDT.

nodes.label: IMEI-45892xxx
nodes.riskExplanation: Device accessing multiple fake trading platforms. Browser history shows scam website administration.

nodes.label: UPI-xxx@gpay
nodes.riskExplanation: UPI used for collecting smaller investment amounts (₹5K-25K) from victims.

nodes.label: +91-99xx-xx3344
nodes.riskExplanation: KYC fraud call center number. Sends fake bank KYC update links via SMS.

nodes.label: PNB-xxx1187
nodes.riskExplanation: Receives funds from phished bank accounts. Multiple victims reported unauthorized debits to this account.

nodes.label: IMEI-72341xxx
nodes.riskExplanation: Device hosting phishing website mimicking SBI online banking portal.

nodes.label: Aadhaar-xxxx9912
nodes.riskExplanation: Identity of a victim whose credentials were compromised. Used unknowingly in the scam chain.

clusters.name: Jamtara Digital Arrest Ring
clusters.description: Organized ring operating from Jamtara district. Members impersonate CBI/ED officers, threaten victims with arrest, and coerce transfer to mule accounts. Uses deepfake voice technology.
clusters.recommendedAction: Coordinate with Jharkhand Cyber Cell. Issue lookout notice for IMEI-35291xxx. Freeze all linked bank accounts under PMLA.

clusters.name: Mumbai Customs Scam Network
clusters.description: Network impersonating customs officials, claiming victims' parcels contain illegal items. Demands customs clearance fees and threatens arrest under NDPS Act.
clusters.recommendedAction: Alert Mumbai Cyber Crime Branch. Block identified phone numbers via DoT. Conduct raid on suspected call center location.

clusters.name: Crypto Investment Fraud Syndicate
clusters.description: Sophisticated investment scam using fake trading platforms and Telegram groups. Victims are lured with small initial profits before losing large deposits.
clusters.recommendedAction: Coordinate with I4C for cross-border investigation. Block identified crypto wallet addresses. Issue SEBI advisory about fake platform.

clusters.name: KYC Phishing Cell
clusters.description: Small cell operating fake KYC update campaigns via bulk SMS. Phishing pages mimic SBI/HDFC/ICICI banking portals to steal credentials.
clusters.recommendedAction: Report phishing domains to CERT-In for takedown. Alert telecom operators about bulk SMS sender IDs. Monitor PNB account for further activity.
